title: Book errata file
description: Ground-truth errata for one book, source of truth for the generated errata page.

slug.description: URL slug; matches the WordPress path, e.g. analysis-i.

source.description: Canonical URL this data was migrated from (for reference).

notes.description: Free text shown atop the page.

description.description: Introductory prose / comments about the book, shown above the errata.

publication.description: Bibliographic data for the book as a whole.

links.description: Related links (companion volumes, sample chapters, publisher pages, etc.).

contributors.description: Legacy contributor pool. Per-erratum credit going forward lives in each erratum's reported_by; the rendered contributor list is the union of this legacy list and all reported_by names.

note.description: Optional lead-in shown above the contributor list.

legacy.description: Names credited for corrections received on/before the `migrated` date. Never fabricate these.

migrated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) before which all existing errata are treated as legacy contributions. Also the floor for the auto-computed last-updated date.

editions.description: May be empty for a book with no recorded errata (renders as a bare page).

name.description: Edition heading. Omit for a book with a single, unlabelled errata list (no per-edition <h2> is then shown).

active.description: Whether this edition's errata show in the main list. Defaults to true when omitted. Set false for superseded/older editions, which render in a collapsed 'older editions' section.

id.description: Stable within-file id for cross-reference, e.g. fourth-edition-0042.

page.description: Page token exactly as printed: "9", "x" (front matter), "101, 133" (spans). Use "?" for a KNOWN-location-but-unknown-page stub; null for entries with no page concept (e.g. "General:" notes).

location.description: Optional structured locator, e.g. "Example 1.2.12" or "Exercise 11.9.1". Enrichment field; may be empty during migration.

text.description: The correction. Inline math in $...$ (LaTeX). This is the human-readable ground truth.

reported_by.description: Contributor(s) of this correction. Going forward, set this on new errata; it feeds the auto-generated contributor list. Legacy errata leave it empty (credited via book.contributors.legacy).

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) this correction was contributed. Set on new errata going forward; feeds the auto-computed last-updated date. Legacy errata omit it (dated at book.migrated).

status.description: Defaults to open. 'fixed' means resolved in a later printing/edition.

fixed_in.description: Edition/printing where this was corrected, when status is fixed.
